name: maiacpp
description: MaiaCpp (WebCpp): C++98 to C transpiler integrated with MaiaC.

scripts.ready:release: python3 ./compiler/tests/run_tiered_cpp98.py && python3 ./compiler/tests/run_fixtures.py --fixtures-dir ./compiler/tests/fixtures --parser ./compiler/cpp-compiler.js --mode compiler && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/test_cpp98_extended.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/401_namespace_overload.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/402_object_memory.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/403_using_directive.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/404_namespace_alias.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/405_pointer_cv.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/406_elaborated_type.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/407_abstract_declarator.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/408_control_flow.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/409_enum_specifier.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/410_declarations.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/411_conversion_operator_id.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/412_try_throw_catch.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/413_throw_expression.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/414_linkage_specification.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/415_asm_definition.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/416_explicit_instantiation.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/compare_cpp_vs_pipeline.py --file ./compiler/tests/equivalence/417_explicit_specialization.cpp && python3 ./compiler/tests/equivalence/417_explicit_specialization.cpp --runtime browser-host
